title: TheMiddleOfTheRings
description: TheMiddleOfTheRings is a complex rpg modpack, that allows you comfortly start your jorney in Middle Earth world!
body:
TheMiddleOfTheRings - is complex Minecraft fabric 1.21.1 modpack about adventure in the Middle Earth world. This modpack positions itself as an fantasy RPG, it is also well optimized. 

# Github link
https://github.com/limerosee/themiddleoftherings/

# IMPORTANT
**- !!! this modpack needs at minimum 6gb of allocated ram !!!**
